verification_note: PDF-first audit from Santhanam Vol 1 pp.145-151. 4 gaps found: 1 in v.1-3 (combust/weak as distinct condition), 3 in v.24-32 (9-sons, 1-son, offspring-via-2nd-wife not individually encoded).

claims.claim: 5th lord + ascendant lord in own signs or angle/trine -> happiness through children
5th lord in 6th/8th/12th -> no offspring
5th lord combust or with malefics and weak -> no children; if obtained they quit world soon
claims.gap_note: Distinct from dusthana placement per granularity rule #1. A chart can have 5th lord in good house but combust. Currently bundled into BPHS1601 description but conditions only check dusthana.

claims.claim: 5th lord in 6th + lagna lord conjunct Mars -> lose first child, female not fertile thereafter
5th lord in dusthana + Mercury and Ketu in 5th -> one child only (Kakavandhya Dosha)
5th lord in fall + not aspecting 5th + Saturn and Mercury in 5th -> one child only
9th lord in ascendant + 5th lord in fall + Ketu in 5th with Mercury -> progeny after great ordeal
5th lord in dusthana/inimical sign/fall -> beget issues with difficulty
5th house owned by Saturn/Mercury + occupied/aspected by Saturn and Mandi -> adopted issues
Sun and Moon in same Rasi and Navamsa -> brought up by 3 mothers or 2 fathers
6 planets in 5th + 5th lord in 12th + strong Moon/ascendant -> adopted issue
5th lord strong + 5th aspected by Mercury/Jupiter/Venus -> many children
5th lord with Moon or in Moon's decanate -> beget daughters
5th lord in movable sign + Saturn in 5th + Rahu with Moon -> child of questionable birth
Moon in 8th + Jupiter in 8th from Moon -> native born of other's loins (illegitimate)
5th lord exalted or in 2nd/5th/9th or conjunct/aspected by Jupiter -> children assured
3-4 malefics in 5th + 5th lord in fall + no benefic in 5th -> children indulge in mean deeds
Jupiter in 5th + 5th lord with Venus -> offspring at age 32/33
5th lord in kendra with Jupiter -> beget child at age 30 or 36
Jupiter in 9th + Venus in 9th from Jupiter + lagna lord -> child at age 40
Rahu in 5th + 5th lord with malefic + Jupiter debilitated -> lose child at age 32
Malefic in 5th from Jupiter + another in 5th from ascendant -> loss of children at 33 and 36
Mandi in ascendant + ascendant lord in fall -> grief from loss of child at age 56
Compound yoga for 10 sons: malefics in 4th/6th + 5th lord deep exaltation + lagna lord + Jupiter with benefic
Jupiter in deep exaltation + Rahu with 2nd lord + 9th occupied by own lord -> nine sons
claims.gap_note: Distinct conditions from 10-sons yoga. Mentioned in BPHS1618 description but not separately encoded with its own conditions.

claims.claim: Jupiter in 5th/9th + 5th lord strong + 2nd lord in 10th -> eight sons
Saturn in 9th + 5th lord in 5th -> seven sons, twins born twice
5th lord in 5th + conjunction with 2nd lord -> 7 sons, 3 will pass away
Malefic in 5th from ascendant + Jupiter in 5th from Saturn (or vice versa) -> only one son
claims.gap_note: Distinct condition with specific planet-from-planet reference. Not encoded.

claims.claim: 5th house has malefic or Saturn in 5th from Jupiter -> offspring only through 2nd or 3rd wife
claims.gap_note: Separate prediction (offspring via later wife) with distinct conditions. Not encoded.

claims.claim: 5th lord with Mars -> native lives long but loses children one after the other
